title: Slabfish Depot
body:
**Disclaimer:** This mod is simply a resource pack/data pack hybrid and contains very little Java code. It is only packaged as such for the sake of convenience when installing. 

--- 
**Slabfish Depot** brings in support for both *Environmental* and *Dye Depot*, allowing slabfish to wear 16 more color-based sweaters, each with its own distinct look!

![Left-to-Right, Top-to-Bottom: Maroon, Rose, Coral, Ginger, Beige, Tan, Amber, Olive, Forest, Verdant, Teak, Mint, Aqua, Skate, Navy, Violet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e48bb4ccd222629e72b685cee50ac3e7e4b9d846.png)
